title: eriogonum latifolium var. affine
intro: Eriogonum latifolium var. affine, also known as California buckwheat, is a perennial herb that belongs to the Polygonaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful in treating wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The health benefits of Eriogonum latifolium var. affine include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and provide antioxidant properties, which can help protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used externally to treat skin conditions or internally to support overall health and well-being.
